description: A roadside clinic still hums on backup power. The front lock is dead, the window bars are loose, and someone inside is trying not to breathe loudly.

options.summary_consequence: Entered without build leverage and created noise risk.

options.text: Repair the door relay and walk in quietly.
options.locked_text: The relay still has power, but the repair is beyond your training.
options.summary_consequence: Used old-world repair skill to preserve resources and unlock medical leverage.

options.text: Tell the squatters exactly what happens if they keep the door shut.
options.locked_text: You can threaten them, but they will not believe you know how to back it up.
options.summary_consequence: Gained access through threat, increasing later distrust risk.

options.text: Flash fake relief credentials and claim the clinic inventory.
options.locked_text: The lie is obvious to you only after the words are already too late.
options.summary_consequence: Used false authority to turn a locked clinic into social cover.
